text: Closure requests must be honoured within 7 working days; failure incurs a penalty of Rs 500 per calendar day of delay when no amount is outstanding.
Failure to complete closure within seven working days results in a penalty of Rs 500 per day of delay when no amount is outstanding.
Regulated entities must update KYC records in the Central KYC Records Registry within 7 days of receiving updated information from a customer.
Officially Valid Documents include passport, driving licence, Aadhaar possession proof, voter ID, NREGA job card, and the NPR letter.
Changes in charges take prospective effect only, with prior notice of at least one month.
